hub_subtitle: Business English for global coffee trading

lesson.menu_title: The Alphabet of Business -- Spelling Out Loud
lesson.menu_desc: Spelling names, companies and terms -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 4 -- Spelling Names, Companies and Key Terms Out Loud
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernanda Gabriela Silva Rodrigues | Aula 4 -- The Alphabet of Business

listenings.text: Hello, and welcome to the International Commodity Conference. Please go to the registration desk. Spell your full name slowly for the host. Then say your company name and your position. Our headquarters is in Switzerland, and we have a branch in Brazil. The host writes your last name letter by letter, so please speak clearly. Thank you, and enjoy the conference.

Hi, this is a message for the support team. My last name is spelled R-O-D-R-I-G-U-E-S. My company is Sucafina, S-U-C-A-F-I-N-A. I work for the trading department. Our headquarters is located in Switzerland. Please update my full name and my position in the system. Call me back if you need more letters. Thank you very much.

extra_audio.text: Fernanda goes to the registration desk. The host asks for her full name. She spells her last name letter by letter. She says her company and her position. The host writes everything in the system.
